name: Multi Loan Payoff Comparison
description: I wanted a way to compare loan payoff strategies and see the benefits. This allows you to create different sets of loans (student, mortgage, cc) and play with some payoff options and then combine them all into 1 to see the savings. All of the data you enter is stored on your computer.

name: Password Generator
description: A password generator that is slightly customizable and doesn't require you to install or sign up for anything.

name: Alarms
description: Setup multiple alarm sets and run them on your computer. Need to remember to stand up and move while working? This is the app. Need to build a workout alarm set to keep you on track? This is the app.

name: Sight Word Flash Card Game
description: Flash card game for practicing sight words from kindergarten through 12th grade. Race through word lists and track improvement with high scores.

name: Arithmetic Practice Game
icon: <svg width='48' height='48' viewBox='0 0 48 48' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><line x1='8' y1='12' x2='16' y2='12' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round'/><line x1='12' y1='8' x2='12' y2='16' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round'/><line x1='32' y1='12' x2='40' y2='12' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round'/><line x1='8' y1='32' x2='16' y2='40' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round'/><line x1='16' y1='32' x2='8' y2='40' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round'/><circle cx='36' cy='33' r='1.5' fill='currentColor'/><line x1='32' y1='36' x2='40' y2='36' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round'/><circle cx='36' cy='39' r='1.5' fill='currentColor'/></svg>

name: Digital Pet
description: First version of a digital pet. More features to come in the future.

name: DropCard
description: A mobile-first contact sharing app built for meetings. The host creates a meeting and displays a QR code — attendees scan it, choose exactly what contact info they want to share, and instantly see everyone else in the room. No awkward card swapping, no sharing more than you want to.

name: Spelling Blaster
description: A fun way for kids to practice spelling and build typing speed. Words fall down the screen and you have to type them before they reach the bottom. Difficulty and speed increase over time, and top scores are saved so kids can track their improvement.

name: Math Sheets
description: Generate and print customized math practice worksheets. Pick your operations and number ranges to create printable sheets.

name: PaintPal
description: Turn any photo into a coloring page. Use the built-in pictures or upload your own, then fill it in with paint-by-number or free paint mode. Three difficulty levels, works offline, and your progress saves automatically on your device.

name: Arcade
description: A collection of remade arcade classics built for fun — Pac-Man and more. Retro style, browser-based.
